headline: Sands China Concludes Successful Participation at Art Central
summary: Presented by Sands China, the Sands Gallery booth concluded successfully March 29 at Art Central, Hong Kong's premier annual international art event. Throughout the five-day exhibition, the booth attracted strong interest from international gallery representatives, collectors, and artists, fostering cross-cultural exchanges centred on the works of three young Macao artists — Lei leng Wai, Leong Chi Mou, and Dor Lio Hak Man.
